pick2.lesson: The agent wasted time heating an empty mug and moving it around instead of first locating and picking up the two required objects from their initial locations.
The agent wasted time exhaustively opening empty containers instead of first searching for and picking up the required objects after finding them.
The agent wasted time opening all containers without first identifying the required objects, so it should prioritize searching for the task's specific items to avoid inefficient exploration.

heat.lesson: The agent wasted time exploring irrelevant objects instead of focusing on the coffeemachine and a heat source for the task.
The agent wasted time exploring irrelevant locations instead of focusing on the heat-related task, likely failing to identify and use the coffeemachine or stove.

clean.lesson: The agent wasted time exploring unrelated objects instead of focusing on using the towel with a dirty target or finding cleaning supplies like soap.
The agent wasted time exploring irrelevant containers instead of first identifying the specific objects and surfaces that needed cleaning.
The agent wasted time exploring irrelevant objects instead of first identifying the dirty target and the necessary cleaning tools, leading to a timeout.

cool.lesson: The agent wasted time exploring irrelevant locations instead of focusing on the coffeemachine and cooling-related objects for the "cool" task.
